title: Crazy Craft Chaos
description: Godzilla, Mass Destruction, Orespawn and more! Time to jump into the chaos of Crazy Craft.
body:
![Crazy Craft Chaos SS 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/l2L3VNdR/images/ca162201578c247c622526b291605a2b520760d0.png)
# Overview
**Crazy Craft Chaos** a Modpack inspired by Crazy Craft bringing it to a modern version. Godzilla, Nuclear bombs, TnT of mass destruction, Orespawn, God tools, Space, need I go on...? Enjoy a modern take on Crazy Craft, filled with all your favourite nostalgia!

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/chaos-crazy-craft)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/chaos-crazy-craft)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
# Features
- [✔️] **OreSpawn Remake** - Mobs, Tools, Weapons, Dimensions, Ants, Monsters and so much more!
- [✔️] **Godzilla** - From the movies to your screen, fight Godzilla and the monsters brought back to life.
- [✔️] **Mass Destruction** - Who doesn't like weapons of mass destruction? Settings of a block of tnt vs a nuclear bomb, nobody will know... Or perhaps a death ray or supernova!

### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
